name: Chocolate Covered Marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate pieces and milk chocolate chips in a heavy saucepan.
2. Add the sweetened condensed milk and marshmallow cream to the melted chocolate.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Using two forks, roll each marshmallow individually in the chocolate mixture.
5. Place the coated marshmallows on waxed paper.
6. Allow them to set overnight before serving.
